---
title: "About me"
description: |
  Hi there! I'm Alex.
  
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

I’m a neuroscientist in the Washington, DC area. I received my PhD in Neuroscience at the University of Colorado Anschutz Medical Campus in Denver, CO. I’m now a postdoctoral fellow at the NIH, and on the side I am pursuing part-time studies in Statistics.


My past and present research is described on my [Research](research.html) page. 


My career goal is to become an independent investigator in neuroscience and to teach statistics courses for researchers in the biological sciences.


I also really like [running](misc.html), [taking pictures of my cat](cauchy.html), [painting](page.html) and scientific illustration, and board games. I built this website with the R package {Distill}, which you can learn more about [here](https://rstudio.github.io/distill/).
